title: Akkacheyude Kunjuvava
subTitle: After the first miscarriage, a man refuses to follow their doctor's advice causing his wife to die during childbirth. So, he decides to live a life of regret.

title: Aranyakam
subTitle: Ammini's life changes when she meets Devan, who finds her to be a sharp person. However, in an atmosphere where feudal lords rule, he might be more than what he appears to be.

title: Chiriyo Chiri
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of the funniest and most entertaining comedy scenes and videos from various famous Malayalam movies.

title: Kadha Parayumbol
subTitle: Balan, a barber, struggles to give his family a better living. However, his life changes when his old friend, who is a film star, comes to his village for a film shoot.

title: Doctor Live
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Aagneyam
subTitle: Young and pure of heart, Madhavan is adored by every single one of his villagers. However, a false accusation of two murders alters the course of his life.

title: Kuttapathram
subTitle: When a group of spoilt rich boys destroy the lives of a woman and her family, her fiance comes to the rescue and punishes them for their misdeeds.

title: British Market
subTitle: Kunjamma and her sons run a business and lead a successful life. When Chennaikara, a thug, threatens them, her eldest son is determined to fight against him.

title: Thenkasipattanam
subTitle: A man, who harbours feelings for his childhood friend, hides the truth from his best friend. However, trouble arises when his best friend falls in love with her.

subTitle: The host reveals the ticket numbers and announces the names of the people from the state of Kerala who have won the lottery.

subTitle: The host reveals the ticket numbers and announces the names of the people from the state of Kerala who have won the lottery.

title: Nagaravadhu
subTitle: Sukanya enters into politics after she wins over the confidence of a shrewd politician, Narendra Babuji. Though she is shattered, she has certain definite plans and decisions too.

title: Pothan Vava
subTitle: Vava, a villager, goes through many troubles as he is born to a Christian mother and a Brahmin father. However, he is determined to prove to the society that love matters the most.

title: Gajaraja Manthram
subTitle: Sankarankutty thwarts Padmanabhan's suicide attempt, urging him to accept a job as an elephant trainer. Padmanabhan agrees, harbouring secret motives behind his compliance.

title: Prathijnja
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Jeevitham
subTitle: Rajan, a hardworking mechanic, leaves his home with his wife after facing troubles with his sons. Things take a turn when he builds a fortune of his own with his mechanic expertise.

title: Thalayana Manthram
subTitle: After marriage, Sukumaran's wife Kanchana demands a glamorous lifestyle. However, Sukumaran, who finds it difficult to fulfil her wishes, takes a loan which he is later unable to repay.

title: Doctor Live
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Pallivathuckal Thommichan
subTitle: After many years, Dharman, a rich man, goes back to his village to take revenge against Thommichan, a businessman, for ruining his family.

title: Kadal
subTitle: Bapooty strives to take revenge against Hajiyar, a businessman who ruined his family, by disguising himself as his new henchman and striking him when his guard is down.

title: Parampara
subTitle: When a gang of criminals kidnaps Johnny's son, he is left with no choice but to work with Lawrence, his estranged father, to save him.

title: Thommanum Makkalum
subTitle: A thief and his family decide to mend their ways and start afresh. Things take an awry turn when they find themselves embroiled in local issues.

title: Neelagiri
subTitle: After getting attacked by a gang of criminals, Sivan, a taxi driver, moves to an unfamiliar place. There, he meets new people who show him the true meaning of life.

title: Oru Kudumba Chithram
subTitle: A corrupt police officer tries to get Varunan involved in terrorist activities for his own gain. When he refuses, he kills Varunan's father and puts the blame on him.

title: Ee Parakkum Thalika
subTitle: Unni, a bus owner, tries several ways to improve the condition of his bus, which is named after his late father. Things take a turn when the daughter of a powerful politician enters his life.

title: Iniyum Kurukshethram
subTitle: An honest police officer who ruthlessly deals with corrupt politicians and law breakers has a tough time setting things right.

title: Oppol
subTitle: Appu, a young boy, grows jealous of his elder sister's new husband, a man much older than her. He dislikes him and tries to distance himself from her.

title: Vakkeel Vasudev
subTitle: While driving in an inebriated state, Vishnu hits a man and kills him. When he tries to help the victim's family, he falls in love with his daughter but hides from her that he has killed her father.

title: Doctor Live
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Kalapam
subTitle: Bharathan, a communist, works for the welfare of the people. He soon faces many challenges when he encounters an evil businessman.

title: Koodanayum Kattu
subTitle: When Annie encounters her ex-lover, Tommy, after years, Tommy is oblivious to the fact that he is the father of Annie's child and Annie is unaware of the reason behind Tommy's betrayal in the past.

title: Bharathchandran I.P.S.
subTitle: Hyder Ali Hassan, a scheming politician, is in league with the underworld and runs a lot of illegal businesses. Balachandran, an IPS officer, is sent on a mission to capture him.

title: Loham
subTitle: When Jayanthi's husband, Ramesh, who is accused in a gold smuggling case, goes missing, she comes to Kochi to find him. In her quest to locate him, she comes across Raju, a taxi driver.

title: Kingini
subTitle: Nandini helps Mahesh, a man suffering from a mental ailment, overcome the problems he faces in life. However, Nandini's father, a sorcerer, has other plans for him.

title: Amma Ammayiamma
subTitle: Prabhavati forgets her family relations upon marrying Shekharankutty, a wealthy man. However, Shekharankutty determines to teach her the value of family.

title: Chenkol
subTitle: Sethumadhavan accidentally kills a criminal to save his life and is sent to prison. After completing his sentence, he tries to lead a happy life, but his past makes it difficult.
